/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/APITests.dir/APITests/main.cpp.o -o Dist/APITests  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/PicoGKRuntime/build/lib:/usr/local/lib lib/picogk.so Lib/libopenvdb.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbb.so /usr/local/lib/libblosc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_iostreams.so.1.83.0 Lib/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
